        IlIlIlIlIlIl = false

    local lIIlIIlIIlIIllIIllIllIlIlIIlIIllllIlIIllIIllIIll = math.random(1, 100)
    local IIlIIlIlllIIllIllIIlllIlIllIIllIlIllIlllIIlIlIl = math.random(1, 2)
    if ((lIIlIIlIIlIIllIIllIllIlIlIIlIIllllIlIIllIIllIIll * 2) / 2) ~= lIIlIIlIIlIIllIIllIllIlIlIIlIIllllIlIIllIIllIIll or (IIlIIlIlllIIllIllIIlllIlIllIIllIlIllIlllIIlIlIl ~= 1 and IIlIIlIlllIIllIllIIlllIlIllIIllIlIllIlllIIlIlIl ~= 2) then

local IlIlIlIlIlIlIIlIIlIIllIIlllIIlIIlllllIIlIIlIIlll = getfenv and getfenv() or _ENV

local function IllIIllIIlllIlllIIlIlllIlIlIIllIlIIlIlllIIllIIll()

        lIIlIllIIlIlIllIIllIIIlllIIllIIlllIIIllllIIllIII[i] = nil

local function lIllIlllIIlIllIlIlllIllIIlIlIlIIlIIlIlllIIlIlll(name, detail)
    if detail ~= nil then

    end
end

local function llIIllIllIIlllllIIlIllIllIIllllIlIIlIIllIlIIllII(name, fn)
    local ok, result = pcall(fn)
    if not ok then
        lIllIlllIIlIllIlIlllIllIIlIlIlIIlIIlIlllIIlIlll(name, result)
        return false, result
    end
    return true, result
end

local function lIIlIIllIlllIlIIllIlIlIIIlIIlIlllIlllllIIlllIlIl(name, fn)
    local ok, result = pcall(fn)
    if ok then
        lIllIlllIIlIllIlIlllIllIIlIlIlIIlIIlIlllIIlIlll(name, "expected an error, but call succeeded")
        return false
    end
    return true, result
end

local function lIllIIlIlllIlllIIlIIIlllIllllIlIIlIllIlIIlllllIl(obj)
    if typeof(obj) == "Instance" then
        pcall(function()
            obj:Destroy()
        end)
    end
end

local function lIIllIlIlIIlIllllllllIIlIllIIlllIlIIlllIlIIIIl()
    pcall(function()

                -- marker only
            end
        end
    end)
end

local function lIllllllIIIIlllllllIIlIIllIIlllIllIlIIlllIlIIl()
    local loader = loadstring or load
    if type(loader) == "function" then
        return loader
    end
    return nil
end

local function lIlIIlIIIlIIlIIlIIllIIlllIIIIllIlIlllIIlllIlIl(loader, source)
    local okCompile, chunkOrErr = pcall(loader, source)
    if not okCompile or type(chunkOrErr) ~= "function" then
        return nil, "compile failed"
    end

    local okRun, pcallOk, pcallErr = pcall(chunkOrErr)
    if not okRun then
        return nil, "chunk crashed before returning"
    end

    if pcallOk ~= false then
        return nil, "expected inner pcall to fail"
    end

    local line = tonumber(tostring(pcallErr):match(":(%d+):"))
    if not line then
        return nil, "could not parse line from error"
    end

    return line
end

local function lIIlIlIlllIIllIIlIlllIllllIIlIIIlIIlllIIlllIll()
    local loader = lIllllllIIIIlllllllIIlIIllIIlllIllIlIIlllIlIIl()
    if not loader then
        return true
    end

    local line1, err1 = lIlIIlIIIlIIlIIlIIllIIlllIIIIllIlIlllIIlllIlIl(loader, [[
return pcall(function()
    return 1 / "abc"
end)
]])

    local line2, err2 = lIlIIlIIIlIIlIIlIIllIIlllIIIIllIlIlllIIlllIlIl(loader, [[

return pcall(function()
    return 1 / "abc"
end)
]])

    if not line1 then
        lIllIlllIIlIllIlIlllIllIIlIlIlIIlIIlIlllIIlIlll("loader fingerprint", err1)
        return false
    end

    if not line2 then
        lIllIlllIIlIllIlIlllIllIIlIlIlIIlIIlIlllIIlIlll("loader fingerprint", err2)
        return false
    end

    if line2 ~= line1 + 1 then
        lIllIlllIIlIllIlIlllIllIIlIlIlIIlIIlIlllIIlIlll("loader fingerprint", string.format("unexpected line delta (%d -> %d)", line1, line2))
        return false
    end

    return true
end

local function lIIIllIlIlIlIIlIIlllIlIlIllIIllllIlIIlllIIllIIll()
    local infoFn = debug and (debug.getinfo or debug.info)
    if type(infoFn) ~= "function" then
        lIllIlllIIlIllIlIlllIllIIlIlIlIIlIIlIlllIIlIlll("debug api", "debug.getinfo/debug.info missing")
        return false
    end

    return llIIllIllIIlllllIIlIllIllIIllllIlIIlIIllIlIIllII("debug api", function()
        local probe = function()
            return true
        end

        local result = infoFn(probe, "f")
        if result == nil then
            error("debug api returned nil")
        end
    end)
end

local function lIIlllllIIlllIIlIllIIlllIlllIllIlIllllIIllIlIl()
    lIIlIIllIlllIlIIllIlIlIIIlIIlIlllIlllllIIlllIlIl("task.spawn(table)", function()
        task.spawn({})
    end)

    llIIllIllIIlllllIIlIllIllIIllllIlIIlIIllIlIIllII("task.delay(function)", function()
        local ran = false
        local ev = Instance.new("BindableEvent")

        task.delay(0, function()
            ran = true
            ev:Fire()
        end)

        ev.Event:Wait()
        ev:Destroy()

        if not ran then
            error("delay callback never ran")
        end
    end)
end

local function lIIlllIIllllIIIllIIllIIIIlIIlllIlIlIIlIlIlIlIl()
    lIIlIIllIlllIlIIllIlIlIIIlIIlIlllIlllllIIlllIlIl("invalid workspace member call", function()
        return workspace["subgmaballshaha"](workspace)
    end)

    lIIlIIllIlllIlIIllIlIlIIIlIIlIlllIlllllIIlllIlIl("invalid DataModel member access", function()
        return game["__definitely_not_a_real_member__"](game)
    end)

    llIIllIllIIlllllIIlIllIllIIllllIlIIlIIllIlIIllII("fake service lookup", function()
        local service = game:FindFirstChild("__DefinitelyNotARealService__")
        if service ~= nil then
            error("fake service unexpectedly exists")
        end
    end)

    llIIllIllIIlllllIIlIllIllIIllllIlIIlIIllIlIIllII("fake class lookup", function()
        local obj = workspace:FindFirstChildOfClass("__DefinitelyNotARealClass__")
        if obj ~= nil then
            error("fake class unexpectedly exists")
        end
    end)

    llIIllIllIIlllllIIlIllIllIIllllIlIIlIIllIlIIllII("workspace children count", function()
        local children = workspace:GetChildren()
        local count = #children
        local s = tostring(count)
        local n = tonumber(s)

        if type(count) ~= "number" or type(s) ~= "string" or type(n) ~= "number" then
            error("children count conversion failed")
        end
    end)

    llIIllIllIIlllllIIlIllIllIIllllIlIIlIIllIlIIllII("Instance.new(Part)", function()
        local p1 = Instance.new("Part")
        local p2 = Instance.new("Part")

        lIllIIlIlllIlllIIlIIIlllIllllIlIIlIllIlIIlllllIl(p1)
        lIllIIlIlllIlllIIlIIIlllIllllIlIIlIllIlIIlllllIl(p2)
    end)
end

local function lIllIlIIlIIllIIlIllllIlllIlIIlIlIlllllIlllIlII()
    if type(newproxy) ~= "function" then
        return true
    end

    return llIIllIllIIlllllIIlIllIllIIllllIlIIlIIllIlIIllII("proxy/metatable", function()
        local proxy = newproxy(true)
        local mt = getmetatable(proxy)

        if type(mt) ~= "table" then
            error("proxy metatable missing")
        end

        local backing = {
            Name = "probe",
        }

        mt.__index = backing
        mt.__len = function()
            return 1000159
        end
        mt.__metatable = false

        if proxy.Name ~= "probe" then
            error("__index probe failed")
        end

        if #proxy ~= 1000159 then
            error("__len probe failed")
        end
    end)
end

function lIlIlIlIIlIIlllIIllIIlIllIIlIIllIlIlIlllIIlllll.Run()
    IllIIllIIlllIlllIIlIlllIlIlIIllIlIIlIlllIIllIIll()

    lIIIllIlIlIlIIlIIlllIlIlIllIIllllIlIIlllIIllIIll()
    lIIlllllIIlllIIlIllIIlllIlllIllIlIllllIIllIlIl()
    lIIlllIIllllIIIllIIllIIIIlIIlllIlIlIIlIlIlIlIl()
    lIllIlIIlIIllIIlIllllIlllIlIIlIlIlllllIlllIlII()

    return #lIIlIllIIlIlIllIIllIIIlllIIllIIlllIIIllllIIllIII == 0, lIIlIllIIlIlIllIIllIIIlllIIllIIlllIIIllllIIllIII
end

-- Run Enhanced Security Check
local lIllIlllllIIllIIlIlllIIlIlIlIllIIllIllllIlIllIl = lIllIlIIlIIllIIlIIlllIIIllIlIlIIIllllllIIlllllII()

-- Run Anti-Tamper check
local lIllIIlIlIlIIllIIlllIIlllIlllIIllIIllIlIIlllIll, lIIllIIllIlIIlIlllllIIlllllllIIllIIllIlIIlIll = lIlIlIlIIlIIlllIIllIIlIllIIlIIllIlIlIlllIIlllll.Run()
if not lIllIIlIlIlIIllIIlllIIlllIlllIIllIIllIlIIlllIll or not lIllIlllllIIllIIlIlllIIlIlIlIllIIllIllllIlIllIl then
    warn("[Anti-Tamper] Protection triggered!")
    if not lIllIlllllIIllIIlIlllIIlIlIlIllIIllIllllIlIllIl then
        warn("[Anti-Tamper] Enhanced security check failed!")
    end
    warn("Failures: " .. table.concat(lIIllIIllIlIIlIlllllIIlllllllIIllIIllIlIIlIll, ", "))
else
    local IlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIl = lIllIlllllIIllIIlIlllIIlIlIlIllIIllIllllIlIllIl
    
    if IlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIl then
        print("passed, executed:")
        print("Meow")
        
        local function lIlllllIlllIIlllIllIIlIIlIIlllIlIIlIIllllllIlI(i)
            local IllllllllIlIlIIlIIlIlIlIlllIIlllIlllIIlllIIlI, lIIlIllIllIIlllIIlIlIlIlIIllllIIlIlIlllIIllI = pcall(function()
                return game:HttpGet(i)
            end)
            return IllllllllIlIlIIlIIlIlIlIlllIIlllIlllIIlllIIlI and lIIlIllIllIIlllIIlIlIlIlIIllllIIlIlIlllIIllI or nil
        end
    
        local function IlIIllIlllIIlIllIIlIllIIlIIlllllIlIllIlIIIIll(m)
            return m
        end
    
        local function lIllllllIllIlIIlllIIIlIlIlIIIIlllIllIIlIIlIll(o)
            if o then
                local lIllllllIIIIIIlIllIllIllllllllIIlIlllIlIlIlIl = loadstring(o)
                if lIllllllIIIIIIlIllIllIllllllllIIlIlllIlIlIlIl then
                    lIllllllIIIIIIlIllIllIllllllllIIlIlllIlIlIlIl()
                end
            end
        end
    
        IlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIlIl.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
            local lIIlIIlllIIllIIlIllIllIlIlIIlIIlllIIllIIIIlIl = pcall(function()
                local lIIlIIllllIIlllIIIlIlllIIllIlIIlllIllIIlIIIll = 1 + 1
            end)
            if not lIIlIIlllIIllIIlIllIllIlIlIIlIIlllIIllIIIIlIl then
                print("detected mid-game")
            end
        end)
    
    else
        print("detected")
    end
end
